name: Turnstile
description:
'''Turnstile''' is an American [[rock music|rock]] band from [[Baltimore|Baltimore, Maryland]], formed in 2010. The band consists of lead vocalist [[Brendan Yates]], guitarists Pat McCrory and Meg Mills, bassist Franz Lyons, and drummer Daniel Fang.

Originally a [[hardcore punk]] group, Turnstile's breakthrough third album ''[[Glow On]]'' was released in 2021, earning critical acclaim and three [[65th Annual Grammy Awards|Grammy]] nominations. Their fourth album ''[[Never Enough (Turnstile album)|Never Enough]]'' was released in 2025 and charted in the top 10 of five countries, including the U.S. The album received five Grammy nominations, making Turnstile the first band to be nominated in the rock, alternative, and metal categories in the same year. The band won the [[Grammy Award for Best Metal Performance]] for their song "Birds" and [[Best Rock Album]] on February 1, 2026.
